name: North-West Oil Group Inc.
summary: North-West Oil Group Inc., a development stage company, engages in the exploration, production, and sale of oil and gas, as well as sale of petrochemical products. The company was formerly known as Nord Oil International Inc. and changed its name to North-West Oil Group Inc. in September 2006. North-West Oil Group Inc. was founded in 2004 and is based in Montreal, Canada.
